    @allure.story("查询物料组名称包含A或物料优先度≥1")
    def test_spec_selectsuccess3(self, config):
        self.item.click_toolbar_button('查询')
        self.item.query_double_click_field_cell(1)
        self.item.query_pick_option("物料组名称")
        self.item.query_click_cell(1, 3)
        self.item.query_pick_option("(")
        self.item.query_open_operator_dropdown(1)
        self.item.query_pick_option("Begins with")
        self.item.query_fill_value_cell(1, "A")
        self.item.query_click_cell(1, 7)
        self.item.query_pick_option(")")
    
        self.item.query_double_click_field_cell(2)
        self.item.query_click_logical_op("or", row=2)
    
        self.item.query_click_cell(2, 3)
        self.item.query_pick_option("(")
        self.item.query_click_cell(2, 4)
        self.item.query_pick_option("物料优先度")
        self.item.query_open_operator_dropdown(2)
        self.item.query_pick_option("≥")
        self.item.query_fill_value_cell(2, "1")
        self.item.query_click_cell(2, 7)
        self.item.query_pick_option(")")
    
        self.item.click_layout_confirm_button('确定')
>       self.item.wait_table_loading()
